summary: Plan-only classification from the hydrated preflight artifact. #78165 remains the best open canonical for the WhatsApp start-account event-loop stall family. The cluster also contains separate related root causes: terminal-disconnect restart loops tracked by #78419/#78511, plugin registry discovery event-loop pressure tracked by #78100/#78639, and dispatch ack false-negative semantics tracked by #80177. No GitHub mutations are planned in this result.
